title: Long NBT Killer
description: Prevent minecraft from crashing while encountering deep nbt tags
body:
## Introduction
When Minecraft is encountering any compound / list nbt tag with a depth greater than 512, it throws an exception and refuses to load the save.

This mod replaced the annoying mechanism with a harmless log warning, and let the game go ahead.

## ATTENTION

- A compound / list nbt tag with a depth greater than 512 itself is abnormal, and you may check your save via NBT editor after receiving the warning in the log;
- You DEFINITELY CAN add the mod to your modpack.
